# MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundToEven

**Case**

Rounds values to the nearest integer value, with 0.5f rounding toward the closest even value.

## Declaration

```swift
case roundToEven
```
title: MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundToEven
